# =====================================================================
# BollyFlix Telegram Bot - Requirements
# Generated by scanning all .py files in the project
# =====================================================================

# ── Telegram Bot Framework ───────────────────────────────────────────
python-telegram-bot==22.6       # Main bot framework (async, PTB v22)
pyrogram==2.0.106               # Pyrogram client (for Telegram MTProto)
tgcrypto-pyrofork==1.2.8        # Crypto speedup for Pyrogram (Python 3.13 compat)

# ── Web Server & HTTP ────────────────────────────────────────────────
aiohttp==3.13.3                 # Async web server (WebAdmin dashboard)
aiohttp-cors==0.8.1             # CORS middleware for aiohttp
requests==2.32.5                # Sync HTTP client (scraper, bypass)
urllib3>=2.0.0                  # HTTP pooling (used by requests)

# ── HTML Parsing ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
beautifulsoup4==4.14.3          # HTML scraping (search results, content pages)
lxml                            # Fast HTML/XML parser backend for BS4

# ── Browser Automation (Bypass) ──────────────────────────────────────
undetected-chromedriver==3.5.5  # Undetected Chrome driver (Cloudflare bypass)
selenium==4.39.0                # Browser automation base (used by undetected-chromedriver)

# ── Standard Library Extensions ──────────────────────────────────────
# asyncio, json, re, os, threading, time, base64, hashlib — all stdlib, no install needed
